title: Analysis scope at organization level | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Adjusting the analysis scope at the organization level

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/administering-sonarcloud/setting-config-at-org-level/adjusting-analysis-scope/introduction/#related-pages "Related pages")

- [Excluding specific files from the code coverage analysis](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/administering-sonarcloud/setting-config-at-org-level/adjusting-analysis-scope/exclude-from-coverage-duplication/ "Excluding specific files from the code coverage analysis")
- [Excluding specific files from the duplication check](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/administering-sonarcloud/setting-config-at-org-level/adjusting-analysis-scope/exclude-from-coverage-duplication/ "Excluding specific files from the duplication check")
- [Excluding files from analysis based on path-matching patterns](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/administering-sonarcloud/setting-config-at-org-level/adjusting-analysis-scope/excluding-files-based-on-file-paths/ "Excluding files from analysis based on path-matching patterns")
- [Using advanced exclusion features](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/administering-sonarcloud/setting-config-at-org-level/adjusting-analysis-scope/advanced-exclusion-features/ "Using advanced exclusion features")
- [Setting the analysis scope of your project](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/project-analysis/setting-analysis-scope/introduction/ "Setting the analysis scope of your project")
